case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. DIANA CAROLINA DE LA PARRA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LA PARRA, DIANA CAROLINA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00) SERVED NOV-18-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA PARRA, DIANA CAROLINA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-03-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
